creator: aws.amazon.com

evidence.text: To improve the customer experience, BPC started to develop an intelligent chatbot that could respond to customer inquiries. “We use generative AI to enhance our operational efficiency,” says Eugene Tochilkin, engineering manager at BPC. “We aimed to develop a chatbot that could be used by both our clients and customer support teams. For instance, an agent can enter a client’s request into the chatbot and pass the generated response to the customer after review.” This chatbot was trained for high accuracy so that it reduces the workload for customer support agents.

title: Boosting Customer Service and Developer Productivity Using Generative AI on AWS with BPC
